finding: Ruling-party committee chairs throttle legislation to shield investigation targets
reason: Analyst's empirical analysis flipped the mechanism: opposition-majority DPK's own bread-and-butter bills collapsed while political accountability bills rose. Arc 1 retreat #1 (seeded from reflection ledger).

finding: Co-sponsorship network proximity moderates legislative chill
reason: Null result in the wrong direction. Arc 1 retreat #2.

finding: Women SMD passage-rate advantage in 21st-22nd Assemblies
reason: Simpson's Paradox revealed once within-party and individual-switcher decomposition was run: aggregate advantage is compositional (seniority asymmetry from PR quotas), not causal. Arc 1 retreat #3.

finding: 20th Assembly passage rate rose during Park impeachment scandal (+6pp)
reason: Startup artifact: zero bills passed in the first four months because committees had not been constituted. The 'paradox' was comparing signal to noise. Arc 1 retreat #4.

finding: Anti-shirking ramp-up in pre-resignation chief sponsorship
reason: R15 hand-coding revealed 54% of R12 treated cohort were cabinet/court/Blue House exits, not local-executive runners. Clean N=16 cohort inverts to -75% chief-sponsorship drop in final six months. Arc 1 retreat #5.

finding: Cabinet-channel ramp as a second voluntary-exit mechanism
reason: Case-level diagnostic collapsed R17 four-case cabinet finding into one extreme observation plus three nulls. Demoted to single-case story pending replication. Arc 1 retreat #6.
